parent.decision: classify get_data_service as DataService singleton/backing API with route dependency-provider consumers

fresh_gitnexus_impact.interpretation: Fresh worktree indexing reduces the current graph to two route-local provider wrappers. G2.215 remains valid as an ownership split; G2.216 uses the fresh provider-wrapper shape for authorization.

singleton_surface.current_behavior: get_data_service lazily creates and caches DataService() through the module-level _data_service singleton.

static_source_scan.current_shape: Only route-local provider wrappers call get_data_service directly; route handlers consume DataService through FastAPI Depends parameters.

next_lane.name: indicator/data DataService provider/reset seam implementation
next_lane.source_edit_authority: only after this G2.216 package is accepted

required_future_behavior: preserve get_data_service() as the public default singleton fallback
allow a registered provider override for lifecycle wiring and isolated tests
provide a reset helper that clears provider override and cached singleton state
keep indicator and strategy-indicator route provider wrappers compatible without route/OpenAPI contract changes

freshness.gitnexus_tool_note: The root mystocks_spec GitNexus index reported missing_kuzu; this package refreshed and used the isolated g2-216 worktree index.
